summary_en: Jose Gutierrez, founder of DC Latino Pride, historian of the Latino LGBTQ+ community, and longtime community advocate, proudly endorses Jackie Reyes-Yanes for Ward 1. Having known Jackie for more than 15 years, he highlights her commitment to serving diverse communities, connecting people with resources, and building inclusive solutions. Jose believes Jackie’s experience, education, and leadership make her the right choice for Ward 1.
summary_es: Jose Gutierrez, fundador de DC Latino Pride, historiador de la comunidad latina LGBTQ+ y líder comunitario, respalda con orgullo a Jackie Reyes-Yanes para el Ward 1. Tras conocerla durante más de 15 años, destaca su compromiso con las diversas comunidades, su capacidad para conectar a las personas con recursos y su liderazgo inclusivo. Jose cree que la experiencia, preparación y visión de Jackie la convierten en la mejor opción para el Ward 1.
title_en: Jose Gutierrez, Historian of the Latino LGBTQ+ Community, Endorses Jackie Reyes-Yanes for Ward 1
title_es: Jose Gutierrez, historiador de la comunidad latina LGBTQ+, respalda a Jackie Reyes-Yanes para el Ward 1
source: Jose Gutierrez - Historian of the Latino LGBTQ+ Community
